mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monitor_instance ( instance_name, host, dbname, port, username, secret_ref, sslmode, is_enabled, slack_enabled, slack_channel, slack_mention, slack_webhook_url, collection_interval ) VALUES ( #{instanceName}, #{host}, #{dbname}, #{port}, #{username}, #{secretRef}, #{sslmode}, #{isEnabled}, #{slackEnabled}, #{slackChannel}, #{slackMention}, #{slackWebhookUrl}, #{collectionInterval} )
